title: Joshua Tree, 1951: A Portrait of James Dean
original_title: Joshua Tree, 1951: A Portrait of James Dean
overview: Part period melodrama, part film noir, part 50s road movie "JOSHUA TREE, 1951" is a portrait of screen legend and outsider icon James Dean as you have never seen him before.
